userMessage: Set CH1 to 200mV DC 50ohm for high speed serial data at 1Gbps. Set horizontal scale to 500ps per div record length 10 million samples. Set trigger to edge CH1 rising 0V normal mode. Enable fast acquisition with temperature palette. Set acquisition to run continuous for 30 seconds. Add eye height eye width and jitter measurements on CH1. Query all results. Save screenshot of eye diagram.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit applyable TekAutomate flow JSON for this request.

Verification is still insufficient for a few required parts:
- I did not obtain materialized verbatim SCPI outputs this turn.
- The command to explicitly set trigger type to Edge was not verified.
- The measurement source command for binding the added eye/jitter measurements to CH1 was ambiguous in the retrieved results.
- “Jitter” is not a uniquely verified measurement token from the request alone (`JITTERSUMMARY` exists in `MEASUrement:ADDMEAS`, but a generic `JITTER` measurement was not verified).
- Querying “all results” is only partially verified because the measurement-number-to-type/source mapping is not fully authoritative from the retrieved results.

If you want, next turn I can build this once those exact items are verified, or I can give you a minimal reduced flow using only the already-verified setup commands and screenshot step.
